title: [I/A] King's Raid #44 你今日抽咗未?

replies.msg:
Server【Asia】
新手巴絲唔好亂入公會
要入就入Lihkg公會
唔使問有無位，搵到即係有，搵唔到即係無
申請咗邊個公會+ID麻煩填表，優先處理填表巴絲
填完麻煩再係Post度留名話自己填咗表，即有專人為你服務





ANDROID
https://apps.qoo-app.com/app/4943

IOS
https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/kings-raid/id1097735195

所以攻略僅供參考

【LIHKG】King's Raid 新手入門
【最新收錄 底已被起 巴打嘅完美材料攻略】


【LIHKG】King’s Raid 裝備系統簡介


Q：英雄自選劵揀咩英好?
A：有愛>一切
依隻驚無勁唔勁，只有夾唔夾
同埋官方會因應英雄強弱而作出Buff同Nerf嘅調整
今個版本可能弱勢啲，但下個版本可能變神角都未定
所以不如揀咗有邊隻英係你真係鍾意嘅，想用嘅
再係Post度問下有咩組合可以夾佢，咁會比較好
相信各巴絲都好樂意為新手巴絲們解答的

Q：我抽到依樣嘢又唔係專武，咁係咩嚟?
A：Artifact，英文版：https://maskofgoblin.netlify.com


Q：需唔需要刷首抽架？
A：無首抽依回事，因為唔係抽返嚟，係可以直接用英雄自選卷換返嚟(新英除外)
【新手一定會有一張二星同三星英雄自選劵】

Q：幾LV封頂？
Ａ：80，英雄1至80級所需經驗
https://goo.gl/ZTSaJj

如有更多問題可詳見【LIHKG】King's Raid 新手入門或回覆

一字記之曰：肝
每日免費一次打特別關,可以換隨機專武卷,自選聖誕SKIN,以及歐洲紅箱,
亦可以靠打地圖關,龍,同埋聖誕關拎cookies 用黎
1.reset特別關
2.換單抽X20,遺物碎X500,非洲綠箱,大經驗水
***紅箱有機會出聖誕限定遺物,每次battle頭5秒增加回魔,crit resistance***

https://www.plug.game/kingsraid-en#/posts/6994
[Event] Christmas Dungeon Event

Ho, Ho, Ho Raiders!
It’s Winter!
It’s December!!
And Christmas is coming!!

To celebrate upcoming Christmas,
an Event NPC will be visiting Orvel after the maintenance on 7th December.
You wanna know the details?
Check them out!

--------------------------------------------

[Special Christmas Event]

Period: Thurs, 7th Dec after maintenance – Thurs 28th Dec 2017 (23:59:59)
** You still can visit the Event Shop until 23:59:59, Sun 31st Dec 2017

Details :
- Orvel Background and Music will be changed during the event period.



- You will be able to enter the Event Dungeon by talking to NPC Talisha at the center of Orvel.



1. Christmas Dungeon Details
- There are 2 types of Christmas Dungeons: (Normal Dungeon / Special Dungeon)







- Special Dungeon entries will be reset at every midnight
- You can reset the Special Dungeon entries by using 100 Santa Cookies.
- Required Santa Cookies for the reset will increase as following;
100 / 200 / 400 / 800 / 1200 / 1600 / 2000
:: The amount will not increase more after 2000.
- The amount of Santa Cookies for recharging entries will be reset at every midnight.
-You can acquire the Santa Cookies in Raid & Hard Raid (Dragon) / Chapter Stages
during the event period.
- In the Christmas Event Dungeons, you will meet the Event Monster named
“Present Box Mimic”.



- Once you hunt down the Present Box Mimic, snowflakes will come out from it,
and it will give you a buff which increases ally’s ATK for a while.(It can be stacked)
:: Plus, if you hunt down the Present Box Mimic, allies (Users) will get special buff effects.

[Present Box Mimic Special Buff Effects Info]

1. Recovers ally’s (User) HP.
2. Increases ally’s (User) ATK for a while. (Can be stacked)
3. Gives an invincible buff to ally (User).
4. Increases ally’s (User) ATK Spd for a while. (Cannot be stacked)
5. Recovers ally’s (User) Mana.
6. Resets ally’s (User) all skill cooldown.
7. The Present Box Mimic will be divided into two.
** A buff effect will be applied randomly among the listed above.

2. Christmas Event Mission Details




- Christmas Event Missions are added. You can access them in
[Mission] – [Event Mission] tab.
- Christmas Event Missions reset at every midnight

3. Christmas Event Shop Item List



- You can use the Christmas Currency (Santa Cookies / Jingle Bells) to purchase
various items.
- You can use the Christmas Event Shop until 23:59:59, 31st Dec 2017


4. Christmas Green Box / Red Box Details





5. Christmas Artifact Details

- Here comes the Christmas Artifact!!
“Christmas Star Ornament”



:: At the beginning of each battle, for 5 sec, increase Mana Recovery per sec by 260%.
Also, Crit Resistance is increased by 100. This effect cannot be dispelled.

--------------------------------------------

This is all for the Christmas Event
We hope you enjoy the event

Thank you
GM Orvel

記住四個時段去Event拎食物



[Event] Juno's Special Meal Event

Raiders!
This is GM Orvel.

After the maintenance on 7th December,
A new event will begin, which is called “Juno’s Special Meal Event’

Through this event, Juno will give you special meals at the Hero’s inn.
Please read the details below!

--------------------------------------------------

Hero’s Inn:: Juno’s Special Meal Event


[Event Details]
- Period: 7th Dec after maintenance – Next maintenance
* Event period may be changed if the maintenance schedule changes.
- Details: Login to the game 4 times at the designated time to acquire rewards!

[How to attend the Event]

1. Login to King’s Raid and clear at least 1 battle.
(Except Arena, Friendly Duel, and Story Mode)
2. Click the Web- view event page at the designated time
(Breakfast / Lunch / Late- Night Snack)
3. Annnnd Acquire Event Rewards!

[Event Details]
- Breakfast (07:00-10:00): Hot Spring Egg x3
- Lunch (11:00-14:00): Special Meat Stew x3
- Dinner (18:00-21:00): Silver Catfish Filet x3
- Late- night Snack (22:00-23:59:59): Gold Hot Spring Egg x3

So, basically, if you get all food from Juno,
You will be having total 900 Stamina!!

[Event Notes]

- You will be able to enjoy ‘Hero’s Inn:: Juno’s Special Meal’ event until next maintenance.
- If you are already in the game during the designated time, you can acquire the reward
via web- view event page.
- If you miss a meal, the meal cannot be reclaimed again, and you will have to wait for
the next meal.
- Make sure to clear at least 1 battle for the day, otherwise, you cannot claim any meal.
- Event rewards will be sent to your mailbox. Please note that unclaimed rewards cannot be
recovered/reclaimed.
- The event will be reset at every midnight. After midnight, you will have to clear
at least 1 battle for the day.

-------------------------------------------------

[How to attend to Web- view Event]

1) Click the Scroll Icon on the upper right side of the screen

2) Click the EVENT Box

Ta da!!!

Now you can enjoy the event!

Thank you
GM Orvel

https://www.plug.game/kingsraid-en#/posts/7050

[Event] King’s Raid Global Release: 300th Day Anniversary


Greeeeetings! Raiders!
Here comes GM Orvel again.

Did you know that 300th Day Anniversary is coming soon?!
It’s on 12th December 2017!!!
Wow!! I mean, already 300 Days!!

We cannot just let that pass, can we? XD
So, we have prepared something very special for all of ya!

[King’s raid Global Release: 300th Day Anniversary Event]
- Special gifts for 5 days!!



1st Day Gift ♥ - (15:00, 10th Dec 2017)
: Mysterious Fragment x300!!

2nd Day Gift ♥ - (15:00, 11th Dec 2017)
: 3,000,000 Gold + 300 Rubies

3rd Day Gift ♥ - (15:00, 12th Dec 2017)
: [300th Day!!] Random UW Ticket x1

4th Day Gift ♥ - (15:00, 13th Dec 2017)
: Stamina Potion x30

5th Day Gift ♥ - (15:00, 14th Dec 2017)
: [300th Day!!] Random UW Ticket x1

[Notes]
- 300th Day Anniversary Gifts will be sent every 15:00 for 5 days.
- Please note that you must claim the reward mails until 23:59:59, 17th Dec 2017.
- Unclaimed/Deleted mails cannot be recovered/reclaimed.
- [300th Day!!] Random UW Ticket:
:: You can acquire until UW of [Theo / Mediana / Artemia].
:: It won’t include UW for new heroes after listed 3 heroes above.
:: It doesn’t include NPC hero UW.

We hope you enjoy updated content .Thank you
GM Orvel.

Challenge Raid

- 新增挑戰級raid
- 通過遊戲內RAID(龍頭)按鈕進入
- 挑戰RAID為賽季模式(按賽季獎勵/限制/開放時間均會有變化)
- 遇到之前賽季的BOSS也會在戰斗方式和規則等進行變更

第一個挑戰RAID --- 烏爾科 (哥布林族)



開放時間: 12月11日 00:00 ~ 12月24日 23:59:59
難度等級: easy/normal/hard/hell
進入條件: 至少擁有一位35級以上英雄
進入限制: 弓手不可進入
組隊方式: 可3人組隊, 每人可出3人
獎勵條件: 各等級通關3次即可獲得對應獎勵, 每種獎勵只可獲得一次
獎勵:
Easy -- 隨機材料 x600
Normal -- 隨機材料 x700
Hard -- 無限碎片 x800
Hell -- 無限碎片 x1000


:: You must clear Urkak Raid 3 times to acquire rewards.
:: Each difficulty reward will be given only once.
* Every Challenge Raid Season will be announced before its start.
https://bbs.ngacn.cc/read.php?&tid=12992335

其他更新

1. Cursed Ruby Flasks will be added
- 3 types of Cursed Ruby Flasks will be added.
- You can acquire Cursed Ruby Flasks in Conquests.
- Equip the Cursed Ruby Flask, consume stamina to fill the flask.
- Once the flask is full, you will be able to use it to acquire Rubies.
掛夠相對既體力拎石,但係副作用係90%自己暈,亦可以10%增加攻速
(消體力關,經驗關同材料關都會受樽影響,所以小心選擇)
[/quote]
[/quote]

2.
▶ Christmas All-In-One Pack
- Period: Fri, 15th Dec - 23:59:59, Sun 17th Dec 2017
- Details: A 5 star hero package that can be purchased only once per account with 5000 Rubies
[Package Components]
- 5 star Hero Ticket x1
- Costume Ticket x1 (Select 1 among School / Beach / Halloween / Idol Costumes)
- Special Item Summon x10 (x3)
** Please note that 5 star Hero Ticket in All-In-One package includes heroes
those who were released before 21st Sept 2017. (NPC heroes are not included)
-> You can choose up to [Ricardo / Priscilla / Lewisia]
- Heroes released before 21st September were added in the Hero’s Inn on 9th Nov update.

[Notice] Weekly Maintenance Schedule Change & Stamina Item Event



Hello Raiders
This is GM Orvel.

We would like to announce that there will be no Weekly Maintenance this week due to the extra
development work for new content in the near future.

Next maintenance will be scheduled on Thursday, 21st December 2017.
We will post more details about the next maintenance on Tuesday, 18th December 2017.

But!!
We have prepared special events that you can enjoy before that!
Please refer to the details below!

[Event No.1! End of Year GM’s Special Gift]
Period: Mon, 11th Dec Evening Hot Time – Thurs, 21st Dec Evening Hot Time
Details: Bonus 500 Stamina on every Lunch/Evening Hot Time!!
If you claim the additional stamina on both Lunch and Evening Hot Time, you will be getting
1000 additional Stamina a day!

** Stamina will be delivered via mail box. It can be claimed by 23:59:59 of the day.


[Event No.2!! EXP & Gold Package Sales Extension]

- Items: EXP Package & Gold Package
- Previous event Period:
Thurs, 21st Dec after maintenance - Sun, 31st Dec 2017 (23:59:59) (X)
- Extended event Period: - Thurs, 28th Feb 2018 (23:59:59) (O)

- Where to find: Special Shop → [Event]

[Event No.3!! Special Stamina Potions]

- Item: Stamina Potions (150 stamina)
- Period: Thurs, 21st Dec after maintenance – 23:59:59, Wed 10th Jan 2018
- Price: 30 Rubies (1 Stamina Potion)
- Purchase Limit: Can be purchased max 99 times within the event period.
- Where to find: Special Shop → [Event]

Thank you
GM Orvel
